serviceNotes.engine oil: E90 four-cylinder petrol with CBS; MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum oil service with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.micro filter: Cabin micro filter per service plan.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km: BMW E90 CBS schedules air filter replacement with every third engine oil service; at the 30,000 km EU oil-service ceiling this equals 90,000 km maximum spacing.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Long-life plugs commonly ~90,000 km on EU schedules.
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: Automatic (e.g. ZF 6HP): preventive ATF exchange ~100,000 km despite lifetime wording.
serviceNotes.manual gearbox fluid: Manual gearbox: preventive gear oil ~100,000 km.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — EU maximum oil service 30,000 km / 24 months with Long-Life oil. https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — interior (micro) filter per CBS service display; typical maximum cadence aligns with 30,000 km oil-service steps
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — brake fluid every 2 years; BMW owner's manual E90
serviceSources.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — air filter with each third engine oil change (3 × 30,000 km CBS oil ceiling)
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — spark plugs with each third engine oil change (3 × 30,000 km = 90,000 km)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS wear-based brake service); file uses 30,000 km inspection planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS wear-based brake service); file uses 30,000 km inspection planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check CBS item typically every second engine oil service (2 × 30,000 km = 60,000 km maximum spacing)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/automatic-transmission-fluid-capacity.html — ZF 6HP; BMW classifies ATF as lifetime; REC preventive exchange
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: BMW AG does not publish a routine manual gearbox oil interval in the E90 owner literature — preventive REC
serviceSources.xDrive transfer case fluid: BMW specialist consensus; xDrive transfer case often lifetime-fill per OEM — preventive REC for AWD variants
serviceSources.differential fluids: BMW specialist consensus; differentials often lifetime-fill per OEM — preventive REC for xDrive variants
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E90 coolant interval by model; REC preventive ~120,000 km
